title: NoLag Pack
description: A modpack full of main fps boosters. perfect for lowend laptops and computers
body:
NoLag Pack is a lightweight Fabric performance modpack designed to massively boost FPS, reduce lag, and improve smoothness on low-end and budget PCs

What This Pack Does

- Increases FPS
- Reduces stutters & lag spikes
- Improves chunk loading
- Lowers RAM & CPU usage
- Keeps vanilla visuals (with optional shaders)

Included Performance Mods 

 - Sodium – Massive FPS boost and better rendering

 - Lithium – Optimizes game logic and server performance

 - FerriteCore – Reduces RAM usage

 - Entity Culling – Stops rendering hidden entities

 - ImmediatelyFast – Faster UI, particles, and rendering

 - Sodium Extra – Extra performance & visual settings

 - Iris Shaders – Optional shaders with great performance

Who Is This For?

 - Low-end or old PCs

 - Integrated graphics (Intel / AMD iGPU)

 - Players who want smooth gameplay without changing vanilla Minecraft

 - Anyone tired of lag 😤


Expected Results

 - +50–200% FPS increase (depends on hardware)

 - Much smoother gameplay

 - Faster world loading

 - Less RAM usage


Why Choose NoLag Pack?

 - Simple
 - Lightweight
 - Stable
 - Perfect for everyday survival & PvP
 - No unnecessary mods


 💚 If you like smooth gameplay, give NoLag Pack a try!
